description_long: This object is a futuristic smartwatch with a wide, curved digital display that wraps partially around the wrist. The display features a high-resolution touchscreen interface, showing app icons and a digital clock, reminiscent of a smartphone interface. The band is broad, smooth, and appears to be made of a dark, semi-glossy material, likely plastic or composite, with a hollow interior. The watch face is rectangular and seamlessly integrated into the band, with no visible physical buttons or dials. The overall design is sleek and modern, emphasizing a continuous, unbroken surface from the band to the display. The object is visually striking, blending the aesthetics of a smartwatch and a smartphone.
description: A sleek, modern smartwatch with a wide, curved touchscreen display and a broad, dark band. The digital interface resembles a smartphone, with app icons and a digital clock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved digital display and the hollow, wide band structure.
description_view_1: Side-by-side comparison of three watches, highlighting the rectangular display and the smooth, continuous band.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the curvature of the display and the open, hollow underside of the band.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the digital interface and the seamless integration of the display with the band.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is a full-color digital touchscreen with app icons and a digital clock, featuring a minimalist, modern style with no physical markers or subdials.
attribute_strap_type: Wide, continuous band made of smooth plastic or composite material, with a hollow interior and no visible stitching or links.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with a rectangular touchscreen interface, showing time and app icons; no analog elements or complications.
